description: ExtendSim ModL function reference for MCP server

DialogItems.description: Functions for working with block dialog items - get/set values, colors, visibility, etc.

AppendPopupLabels.description: Appends the specified string onto the labels associated with the named popup menu. Popup menu labels can total up to 5100 characters.

arguments.name: variableNameStr
arguments.description: Dialog item name as a string or in quotes

CreatePopupMenu.description: Creates a Popup at the last location the user clicked. Used with dialogClick message handler.

DialogHasEmbeddedObject.description: OBSOLETE AS OF ES10. Returns the dialog item name if the specified block contains any embedded object dialog items.

DialogItemVisible.description: Returns true if the specified dialog item is visible.

DIGetID.description: Returns a dialog item ID number. Used in LINKCONTENT and LINKSTRUCTURE message handlers.

DIGetName.description: Returns the dialog item name from the item's dialogID.

DIMoveBy.description: Offsets the dialog item by the values of the y and x parameters.

DIMoveTo.description: Moves the specified dialog item to the y and x location specified.

DIMsgNumber.description: Returns the message number associated with a dialog item. Used to send a dialog item message to a block.

DIPopupButton.description: Changes the behavior of the specified popup menu so it behaves like a button instead.

DIPositionGet.description: Gets the position of a dialog item. Position array must be declared as: integer array[4]

DIPositionHome.description: Resets the location of the dialog item back to the position and size defined in the structure.

DIPositionSet.description: Sets the position of the specified dialog item including size.
DIPositionSet.signature: DIPositionSet(blockNumber, name, top, left, bottom, right)

DisableDialogItem.description: Disables or enables the specified dialog item.

arguments.name: TRUEFALSE
arguments.description: TRUE to disable, FALSE to enable

DisableDialogItem2.description: Disables the specified Dialog Item with block number argument for remote block access.

DISetFocus.description: Sets the focus on the specified dialog item. Returns 0 for success or negative for failure.

DISetParent.description: Sets a parent-child relationship between dialog items.

DITitleGet.description: Returns the string title of the dialog item (text on radio buttons, checkboxes, etc.).

DITitleSet.description: Sets the title of a dialog item (radio buttons, checkboxes, etc.).
DITitleSet.notes: Use && to display & character in labels

GetDialogColors.description: Copies all the color information from the dialog colors into the color array.

GetDialogItemColor.description: Gets a color value associated with the dialog item.
GetDialogItemColor.notes: For ExtendSim 10 or later, use GetDialogItemEColor

GetDialogItemEColor.description: Returns the EColor value of the color of the dialog item.

GetDialogItemInfo.description: Returns TRUE if the specified quality is true for the dialog item.

arguments.name: which
arguments.description: Quality to check: 0=exist, 1=hidden, 2=enabled, 3=display only, 4=dialog item type, 5=rows, 6=columns, 7=width, 8=height, 9=left, 10=top, 11=tab number

GetDialogItemLabel.description: Returns the nth item label (popup menu item or column header in data table).

GetDialogNames.description: Returns a list of the dialog variables in the specified block.

GetDialogVariable.description: Returns the string value of the named variable. Use StringToReal to convert numeric values.

arguments.name: row
arguments.description: Row index for tables (0 for min, 1 for max, 2 for value on sliders/meters)

GetDialogVariable.notes: Row and col are ignored for non-table items. See also GetStaticVariable and GetVariableNumeric for faster queries.

getStaticVariable.description: Similar to GetDialogVariable but explicitly retrieves a static variable value.
getStaticVariable.notes: Faster than GetDialogVariable when you know it's a static variable

GetVariableNumeric.description: Similar to GetDialogVariable, but returns a numeric (real) value. Faster for non-string variables.

HideDialogItem.description: Hides the named dialog item if hideShow is TRUE.

arguments.name: hideShow
arguments.description: TRUE to hide, FALSE to show

HideDialogItem2.description: Set the hidden/shown status of the item with block number argument for remote access.

arguments.name: hideShow
arguments.description: TRUE to hide, FALSE to show

LastSetDialogVariableString.description: Returns the last string value that was set by SetDialogVariable.

OpenAndSelectDialogItem2.description: Opens the block's dialog, highlighting the dialog item corresponding to varName.

arguments.name: row
arguments.description: Row index (-1 to select entire table)

arguments.name: col
arguments.description: Column index (-1 to select entire table)

PopupCanceled.description: Returns whether or not the last popup menu was canceled.

PopupItemParse.description: Parses the string and removes special formatting characters used in dialog item contexts.

PopupMenuAppendArray.description: Appends the contents of the string array to the popup menu specified by dialogItemName.

PopupMenuArray.description: Creates a flying popup menu based on the strings in theArray (max 20 strings, 5100 chars total).

SetDialogColors.description: Sets all the colors of the dialog items at once.

SetDialogItemColor.description: Sets a color value associated with the dialog item.
SetDialogItemColor.notes: For ExtendSim 10 or later, use SetDialogItemEColor

SetDialogItemEColor.description: Sets the EColor value of the dialog item color.

SetDialogVariable.description: Sets the value of the named variable to the given numeric or string value.

arguments.name: row
arguments.description: Row index for tables (0=min, 1=max, 2=value for sliders)

SetDialogVariable.notes: See also SetVariableNumeric for faster setting of non-string values

SetDialogVariableNoMsg.description: Same as SetDialogVariable, but doesn't send a dialog item message to the block.

SetPopupLabels.description: Sets the named popup menu items to theLabels string. Items separated by semicolons.

SetVariableNumeric.description: Similar to SetDialogVariable, except it takes a numeric (real) value. Faster for non-string values.
SetVariableNumeric.signature: SetVariableNumeric(blockNum, name, value, row, col, msg)

SetVisibilityMonitoring.description: Turns on monitoring of the visibility of a dialog item.

WhichDialogItem.description: Returns the name of the current dialog item in certain message handlers.
WhichDialogItem.notes: Used in CELLACCEPT, DATATABLERESIZE, DATATABLESCROLLED, DIALOGITEMTOOLTIP, DIALOGCLICK handlers

WhoInvoked.description: Determines the source of the invocation of the current message handler.
WhoInvoked.notes: In dialog handler: 1 if from SetDialogVariable, 0 if from user. In OpenModel: 2 if from Hblock placement, 0 if model opening.

Scripting.description: Functions for building or changing models programmatically, including block placement, connections, selection, and preferences.

ActivateApplication.description: Brings the ExtendSim application to the foreground.

ActivateWorksheet.description: Activates (selects and brings to front) the named worksheet.
ActivateWorksheet.notes: Returns 1 for success, 0 for failure (backwards compatibility)

AddBlockToClipboard.description: Adds the indicated block to clipboard without changing other contents.

AddBlockToSelection.description: Adds the indicated block to the selection (vs SelectBlock which replaces selection).

ApplicationFrame.description: Returns the application frame in global coordinates.

arguments.name: inside
arguments.description: TRUE for inside frame, FALSE for outside

BlockAdjustPosition.description: Adjusts block position relative to icon positioner location.

ChangePreference.description: Changes preference values using ModL code.

arguments.name: preference
arguments.description: 12=sound, 14=connection type, 21=worksheet tips, 22=dialog tips, 27=metric, 30=lib warnings, 31=check version, 32=auto-connect, 33=dialog editor tips

ClearBlock.description: Clears (removes) the specified block from the worksheet permanently.

ClearBlockUndo.description: Clears the block and adds it to undo list to allow undoing.

ClearConnection.description: Removes the connection between the specified blocks and connectors.

ClearUndo.description: Clears the Undo list and disables Undo command.

CodeExecute.description: Executes ModL code from a string. Use globals for input/output.

CreateHblock.description: Makes the current selection into an H-block with the specified name.

DialogRefresh.description: Forces the dialog box of the specified block to refresh (redraw).

DialogFixedSize.description: Specifies that the dialog box should be fixed to the specified size.

DuplicateBlock.description: Makes a copy of the indicated block and returns the new block number.

FindBlock.description: Finds the first block matching the search string and returns its block number.

arguments.name: openDialogs
arguments.description: TRUE to open dialog, FALSE to just select

arguments.name: justBlockNum
arguments.description: TRUE to just return number without selecting

FindNext.description: Finds the next block matching the previous search. Call after FindBlock.
FindNext.notes: Returns -1 if no matching block found

GetAppPath.description: Returns the full path name for the ExtendSim application file.

GetPreference.description: Gets preference values. Returns 1 for TRUE, 0 for FALSE.

GetRecentFilePath.description: Returns the full path to the specified recent file (1-5).

GetUserPath.description: Returns the path to the user documents directory.

GetWorksheetFrame.description: Returns the frame of the worksheet in screen pixels.

HBlockTopGet.description: Returns block number of topmost open Hblock's submodel.
HBlockTopGet.notes: Returns negative if no Hblocks open above worksheet

HBlockUnlinkFromLibrary.description: Disconnects the specified Hblock from its library link.

IsBlockSelected.description: Returns TRUE if the indicated block is selected.
IsBlockSelected.notes: Returns -1 if block number is invalid

IsLibEnabled.description: Returns TRUE if ExtendSim product allows specific library.

IsMenuItemOn.description: Returns TRUE if the given menu command is currently checked.

IsMetric.description: Returns TRUE if metric is set in options dialog.

LastBlockPlaced.description: Returns block number of the last block placed on the active worksheet.

MakeBlockInvisible.description: Makes the indicated block invisible (or visible if already invisible).
MakeBlockInvisible.notes: Returns FALSE if successful. Invisible blocks cannot be selected.

arguments.name: modelName
arguments.description: Model name (empty string for active model)

arguments.name: modelName
arguments.description: Model name (empty string for active model)

ModelSettingsSet.notes: Returns 0 for success, non-zero for failure

MoveBlock.description: Moves the specified block by the specified number of pixels.

MoveBlockTo.description: Moves the specified block to the specified absolute location.

OpenExtendFile.description: Opens an ExtendSim model, library, or text file.

PlaceBlock.description: Places a block from a library onto the active worksheet.
PlaceBlock.signature: PlaceBlock(blockName, libName, xPixel, yPixel, neighbor, side)

arguments.name: xPixel
arguments.description: X position (absolute if neighbor=-1, else relative)

arguments.name: neighbor
arguments.description: Block number to place relative to, or -1 for absolute

PlaceBlockInHblock.description: Places a block inside an H-block.

PlaceDotBlock.description: Places a dot block (connection point) into the worksheet.
PlaceDotBlock.signature: PlaceDotBlock(xPixel, yPixel, neighbor, side, width, HblockName)

PlaceTextBlock.description: Places a text block with the specified text content.
PlaceTextBlock.signature: PlaceTextBlock(text, xPixel, yPixel, neighbor, side, width)

PlaceTextBlockInHblock.description: Places a text block inside an H-block.
PlaceTextBlockInHblock.signature: PlaceTextBlockInHblock(text, xPixel, yPixel, neighbor, side, width, HblockNum)

SelectConnection.description: Selects the connection line between the specified blocks.
SelectConnection.notes: Returns TRUE if succeeds, FALSE if fails

SetDirty.description: Sets or unsets the 'dirty' (needs saving) flag on the active worksheet.

arguments.name: dirty
arguments.description: TRUE to mark as dirty, FALSE to mark as clean

SetDirty.notes: Set to FALSE before ExecuteMenuCommand(Close) to close without save prompt

arguments.name: suppress
arguments.description: TRUE to stop drawing, FALSE to resume and redraw

WinSetForegroundWindow.description: Sets the application with the given handle as foreground window.

worksheetSettingGet.description: Gets a setting on the worksheet containing the specified block.

worksheetSettingSet.description: Sets a setting on the worksheet containing the specified block.

MenuCommands.description: ExecuteMenuCommand(commandNumber) executes a specified menu command. This is functionally the same as selecting the command from the menu.

ExecuteMenuCommand.description: Executes a specified menu command by its command number.

ModelsAndSimulation.description: Functions for model operations, simulation control, run parameters, and library information.

DuringContinue.description: Returns true if the model is being continued from a previous saved run.

GetBlockInfo.description: Returns misc information about a block.

GetGlobalSimulationOrder.description: Returns the actual simulation order index of a block.

GetLibraryContents.description: Fills arrays with names and types of blocks in the named library.
GetLibraryContents.notes: Returns number of blocks in library

GetLibraryInfo.description: Returns whether a library is of a certain type.

GetLibraryPathName.description: Returns the pathname of a library file, given a block in that library.

GetLibraryStringInfo.description: Returns string information about the library that the block comes from.

GetLibraryVersion.description: Returns the short version string for the library that includes the specified block.

GetLibraryVersionByName.description: Returns the library version string by library name.

GetModelPath.description: Returns the pathname to the specified model (without model name). Model must be open.

GetModelSimulationOrder.description: Returns the simulation order of the block that called this function.

GetRunParameter.description: Gets a parameter from the Simulation Setup dialog as real value.

GetRunParameterLong.description: Gets a parameter from the Simulation Setup dialog as integer.

GetSerialNumber.description: Returns the serial number of the unit as a string.

GetSimulationPhase.description: Returns the current phase of the simulation.

GetWindowsHndl.description: Returns the Windows API handle of the main ExtendSim window.
GetWindowsHndl.notes: Windows only. Used to pass to Windows DLLs.

IsSimulationPaused.description: Returns TRUE if the simulation run is paused or about to pause.

LibrariesOpen.description: Returns list of library names in the String dynamic array.

LibraryUsed.description: Returns the name of the library that owns the specified block.

ModelLock.description: Locks or unlocks the model from ModL code.
ModelLock.notes: Returns: 0=success, -1=password mismatch, -2=already locked, -3=lock value out of range

PauseSimForSave.description: Pauses simulation at end of time step for saving. Use ResumeSimulation to continue.
PauseSimForSave.notes: Different from PauseSim() which stops instantly

ResumeSimulation.description: Resumes the simulation and returns immediately.

RunSetup.description: Opens Simulation Setup dialog with OK button instead of Run Now.

arguments.name: trueFalse
arguments.description: TRUE to show RunNow button, FALSE to hide

arguments.name: trueFalse
arguments.description: TRUE to show Setup dialog first, FALSE to run directly

RunSimulation.notes: Returns TRUE if simulation completed without errors. From scripting/OLE via ExecuteMenuCommand returns immediately after starting.

SaveModel.description: Saves the model. Cannot save during a simulation run.

SaveModelAs.description: Saves the model under a new name and path.
SaveModelAs.notes: Returns 0 if successful, negative otherwise. Cannot save during simulation.

SaveTopDocAs.description: Saves the top document under specified path.

arguments.name: aSync
arguments.description: TRUE to save after current block executes

SaveTopDocAs.notes: Returns 0 for success, negative for failure

SetBlockSimulationOrder.description: Sets the simulation order value of a block. Only works with custom simulation order.
SetBlockSimulationOrder.notes: Returns: 0=success, -1=during sim, -2=order<=0, -3=no model, -4=not custom order, -5=no block

SetModelSimulationOrder.description: Sets the type of simulation order for the model.

SetRunParameter.description: Sets a single parameter in the Simulation Setup dialog.

SetRunParameters.description: Sets multiple parameters in the Simulation Setup dialog.

SpinCursor.description: Spins the beachball cursor for long calculations.

SpinCursorStart.description: Starts a spinning cursor until SpinCursorStop is called.

SpinCursorStop.description: Stops a spinning cursor started by SpinCursorStart.

BlockInfo.description: Functions for block numbers, labels, names, categories, and position. Blocks are numbered 0 to NumBlocks()-1.

BlockName.description: Returns block name, first 255 chars of text, or empty string if unused slot.

BlockRect.description: Returns block position, optionally including animation objects. Array filled with [top, left, bottom, right].

FindInHierarchy.description: Locates corresponding block (e.g., Catch/Throw pairs). Returns block number or -1 if not found.

FindInHierarchy2.description: Same as FindInHierarchy but takes a block number argument.

GetBlockLabel.description: Returns the label string for the global block.

GetBlockMemSize.description: Returns the number of bytes of memory used by the block.

GetBlockType.description: Returns the category string (e.g., Math or Holding) for the block.

GetBlockTypeNumeric.description: Returns block type without calculating position. Faster than GetBlockTypePosition.

GetBlockTypePosition.description: Returns object type and fills array with position [top, left, bottom, right].

GetEnclosingHblockNum.description: Returns global block number of enclosing hierarchical block. Returns -1 if none.

GetEnclosingHblockNum2.description: Same as GetEnclosingHblockNum() but refers to a global block number.

GetStaticNames.description: Fills arrays with names and types of all static variables in block structure.

GlobalToLocal.description: Returns local block number for block in H-block. Returns -1 if not in H-block.

IconBody.description: Returns rect for icon body with control over animation and connector inclusion.
IconBody.notes: Returns 0 for success, non-zero for error

LocalNumBlocks.description: Number of internal blocks in the hierarchical block from which called.

LocalNumBlocks2.description: Same as LocalNumBlocks() but refers to a global block number.

LocalToGlobal.description: Converts local block number in H-block to global number.

LocalToGlobal2.description: Converts local to global block number for specified H-block.

MakeOptimizerBlock.description: Tags block as optimizer block for Run > Run Optimization command. Call in CREATEBLOCK.

arguments.name: trueFalse
arguments.description: TRUE to tag as optimizer block

MyBlockNumber.description: Returns global number of the block in which called.

MyLocalBlockNumber.description: Returns local number of the block in which called.

NumBlocks.description: Global number of blocks in model, including text blocks and unused slots.

ObjectIDNext.description: Returns objectID of next object of requested type. Faster than NumBlocks loop.
ObjectIDNext.notes: Loop: start with -1, continue while result > -1

SetBlockLabel.description: Sets the label for the global block.

ShowBlockLabel.description: Shows or hides a block's label.

arguments.name: show
arguments.description: TRUE to show, FALSE to hide

BlockConnections.description: Functions for working with block connectors and connection information. Conn is the ith connector (0 to n-1) in the connector pane.

AlignConnection.description: Adjusts the position of the second block (blockTo) to make the connection line between the two connectors specified straight.

GetConBlocks.description: Returns the number of blocks attached to the connector. IntArray rows contain connected block info: column 0 = block number, column 1 = connector number.

arguments.name: intArray
arguments.description: Dynamic array declared as: integer intArray[][2];

GetConHblocks.description: Similar to GetConBlocks() but returns a list of connected Hblocks. Can start from textblock or anchor point.

GetConName.description: Returns the name of the connector.

GetConnectedTextBlock.description: Returns block number of named connection connected to connector. Positive block bypasses Hblock internal connectors, negative stays inside.

arguments.name: block
arguments.description: Block number (positive to bypass Hblock, negative to stay inside)

GetConnectedType.description: Returns the type of connector connected to this connector. Useful for Universal connectors.

GetConnectedType2.description: Similar to GetConnectedType() but uses global block number and connector index.

GetConnectionColor.description: Fills color array with HSV values for the connection line color. Use GetConnectionEColor for ES10+.

arguments.name: colorArray
arguments.description: Three element array for HSV values

GetConnectionColor.notes: Returns 0 for success, negative for failure. As of ES10, use GetConnectionEColor instead.

GetConnectionEColor.description: Returns the EColor value for the specified connection line.

GetConnectorPosition.description: Returns the position of the specified connector in pixels. Array filled with: [0]=top, [1]=left, [2]=bottom, [3]=right.

GetConnectorType.description: Returns the connector type of the specified connector.

GetConNumber.description: Returns the connector number of the connector with the specified name.

GetEnclosingHblockCon.description: Returns connector number of the enclosing Hblock's outer connector, given inner block and connector.

GetIndexedConValue.description: Gets the connector's current value. Use in loop instead of individual connector statements.

GetIndexedConValue2.description: Same as GetIndexedConValue() but refers to a global block number.

GetIntermediateBlocks.description: Returns number of connected dot blocks, text blocks, and connectors between two blocks.

arguments.name: blockNum2
arguments.description: Second block number (negative for text block)

MakeConnection.description: Creates a connection between two block connectors.
MakeConnection.notes: Creates connection line between specified connectors. Output connector should connect to input connector.

GetNumCons.description: Returns the number of connectors on the block.

GetRightClickedCon.description: Returns the conn number of the last right-clicked connector. Call in CONNECTORRIGHTCLICK message.

IsConVisible.description: Tests the specified connector for visibility.
IsConVisible.notes: Returns TRUE if visible, FALSE otherwise

MakeFeedbackBlock.description: Causes ExtendSim to terminate the flow order search for this block. Prevents feedback from changing simulation order.

NodeGetCurrentValue.description: Returns the currently set value of the connected block connectors.

NodeGetIDIndex.description: Returns the nodeID for a connected network of block connectors. Each network has unique nodeID.
NodeGetIDIndex.notes: NodeID can change when connectors are connected or model is reopened

SetConnectionColor.description: Sets the color value of the specified connection line using HSV values. Use SetConnectionEColor for ES10+.
SetConnectionColor.signature: SetConnectionColor(blockFrom, conFrom, blockTo, conTo, hue, saturation, value)
SetConnectionColor.notes: Returns TRUE on success, FALSE on failure. As of ES10, use SetConnectionEColor instead.

SetConnectionEColor.description: Sets the EColor value of the specified connection line.
SetConnectionEColor.notes: Returns TRUE on success, FALSE on failure

SetConnectionThickness.description: Sets the connection line thickness of the specified connection line.
SetConnectionThickness.notes: Returns 0 for success, non-zero for error

SetConVisibility.description: Sets the visibility flag on an individual connector.

arguments.name: visible
arguments.description: TRUE to show, FALSE to hide

SetIndexedConValue.description: Sets the connector's numerical value. Use in loop for blocks with many similar connectors.

SetIndexedConValue2.description: Same as SetIndexedConValue() but refers to a global block number.

SetSelectedConnectionColor.description: Sets the color value of all selected connections using HSV values.
SetSelectedConnectionColor.notes: Returns TRUE on success, FALSE on failure

SetSelectedConnectionEColor.description: Sets the EColor value of all selected connections.
SetSelectedConnectionEColor.notes: Returns TRUE on success, FALSE on failure

VariableConnectors.description: Functions for working with variable (array) connectors. Use ConArrayGetConNumber() to get actual connector number for use with standard connector functions.

ConArrayChangedWhichCon.description: Returns the owning connector name being dragged. Called in CONARRAYCHANGED message handler.

ConArrayGetCollapsed.description: Returns True if the specified connector is collapsed, False if not.

ConArrayGetConNumber.description: Returns the connector number of the nth connector in this array.

arguments.name: nthConn
arguments.description: Index in array (0 for owning connector)

ConArrayGetDirection.notes: Returns -1 if not an array connector or error

ConArrayGetNthCon.description: Given a block connector number, returns the member index of its connector array.

ConArrayGetNthCon2.description: Same as ConArrayGetNthCon but with additional block number argument.

ConArrayGetNumCons.description: Returns the number of connectors in this array. Returns 1 if no added array connectors.

ConArrayGetOwnerCon.description: Given a block connector number, returns the block connector number of the owning connector.

ConArrayGetTotalCons.description: Returns the total number of connectors in this block, including array connectors.
ConArrayGetTotalCons.notes: Used to prevent exceeding 255 connector limit

ConArrayGetValue.description: Returns the value of the nth connector of the array owned by ConName.

ConArrayMsgFromCon.description: Returns the index of the connector that received the message in an array.
ConArrayMsgFromCon.notes: Call at beginning of message handler to know which array connector received message

ConArraySendMsgToAllCons.description: Sends a connector message to all connectors connected to the specified connector.

ConArraySendMsgToInputs.description: Sends a connector message to input connectors connected to the specified connector.

ConArraySendMsgToOutputs.description: Sends a connector message to output connectors connected to the specified connector.

ConArraySetCollapsed.description: Sets the collapsed state on the specified connector.

arguments.name: trueOrFalse
arguments.description: TRUE to collapse, FALSE to uncollapse

ConArraySetNumCons.description: Sets the number of connectors in a variable connector array.

arguments.name: newNumCons
arguments.description: New number of connectors (1 = only original)

arguments.name: trueToIgnoreConnections
arguments.description: TRUE to delete connectors with connections, FALSE to preserve them

ConArraySetValue.description: Sets the value of the nth connector of the array owned by ConName.

ConnectorLabelsGet.description: Gets the connector labels for single connectors or connector arrays.

ConnectorLabelsSet.description: Sets the connector labels for single connectors or connector arrays.
ConnectorLabelsSet.signature: ConnectorLabelsSet(blockNumber, origConNum, numLabels, labelsStrArray[], position, hue, saturation, value)
ConnectorLabelsSet.notes: Labels can contain style info like <biur> for bold, italics, underlined, right-adjusted

RandomAndStatistics.description: Random number generation, distribution sampling, and statistical functions

RandomCheckParam.description: Validates parameters for a distribution type. Returns 1 if valid, 0 if invalid.

RandomCalculate.description: Generates a random value from the specified distribution.

Mean.description: Returns the theoretical mean for a distribution given its parameters.

StdDevSample.description: Returns the sample standard deviation of an array of values.

args.name: arrayIndex
args.description: Global array index containing the data

FileIO.description: File input/output operations for reading and writing external files

FileNew.description: Creates a new file and returns a file reference number.

args.name: fileName
args.description: Full path to the file to create

FileOpen.description: Opens an existing file for reading and returns a file reference number.

args.name: fileName
args.description: Full path to the file to open

FileRead.description: Reads a line of text from an open file.

args.name: stringVar
args.description: Variable to store the read text

FileRead.notes: Returns 0 on success, non-zero on error or EOF

FileWrite.description: Writes a string to an open file.

DatabaseImportExport.description: Database import and export operations for bulk data transfer

DBTableImportData.description: Imports data from a delimited file into a database table. Use negative dbIdx to treat first row as field names.

args.name: fileName
args.description: Full path to the import file

args.name: dbIdx
args.description: Database index (negative = first line is header)

DBTableExportData.description: Exports database table data to a delimited file. Use negative dbIdx to include field names as header.

args.name: fileName
args.description: Full path for the export file

DBDatabasesGetNum.description: Returns the total number of databases in the current model.

DBDatabaseGetName.description: Returns the name of a database given its index.

DBTablesGetNum.description: Returns the number of tables in a database.

DBTableGetName.description: Returns the name of a table given its database and table indices.

DBFieldGetName.description: Returns the name of a field given database, table, and field indices.

DBFieldGetProperties.description: Returns a property of a database field. which=1 returns field type (0=real, 1=integer, 2=string, 3=boolean).

DBDatabaseCreate.description: Creates a new database and returns its index.

DBTableCreate.description: Creates a new table in a database and returns its index.

DBFieldCreate.description: Creates a new field in a table and returns its index.

DBRecordFind.description: Searches for a value in a database field and returns the record index, or -1 if not found.

DBTableSort.description: Sorts a table by up to 3 fields.

DBRelationsGetNum.description: Returns the number of relations in a database.

DBRelationCreate.description: Creates a relation between two tables.

GlobalArrays.description: Global array creation, manipulation, and data access

GACreate.description: Creates a global array and returns its index.

GAResize.description: Resizes a global array to the specified number of rows.

GALastUsedIndex.description: Returns the index of the last used global array.

GAGetIndex.description: Returns the index of a global array by name.

GAGetName.description: Returns the name of a global array by index.

GAGetRows.description: Returns the number of rows in a global array.

GAGetCols.description: Returns the number of columns in a global array.

GAGetType.description: Returns the type of a global array (1=real, 2=integer, 3=string).

GAGetReal.description: Reads a real value from a global array cell.

GAGetInteger.description: Reads an integer value from a global array cell.

GAGetString.description: Reads a string value from a global array cell.

GASetReal.description: Writes a real value to a global array cell.

GASetInteger.description: Writes an integer value to a global array cell.

GASetString.description: Writes a string value to a global array cell.

TimeAndDate.description: Time unit conversion and date/simulation time mapping

ConvertTimeUnits.description: Converts a value between time unit types.

EDSimTimeToDate.description: Converts simulation time to a date string.

EDDateToSimTime.description: Converts a date string to simulation time.

BlockLayout.description: Block positioning, alignment, and worksheet layout functions

MoveBlockTo.description: Moves a block to an absolute pixel position on the worksheet.

GetBlockTypePosition.description: Returns a position value for a block. which: 0=top, 1=left, 2=bottom, 3=right.

AlignConnection.description: Moves the target block so the connection line is straight.

DuplicateBlock.description: Duplicates a block with all its settings. Returns the new block ID.

FindBlock.description: Finds a block by label or name. Returns block ID or -1 if not found.

GetConnectorType.description: Returns the type of a connector. 13=Value, 14=Item, 15=Universal, 25=Flow, 308=Reliability, -1=Array.

PlaceTextBlock.description: Places a text annotation on the worksheet.

SuppressWorksheetRedraw.description: Suppresses (1) or restores (0) worksheet redrawing for performance during batch operations.
